message: Version 1.0.19 refines the compact card layout, editing flow, and full-screen map view.
releaseNotes: The maximized map now opens in true full screen instead of a floating half-screen card.
The reminder note and Date/Time now share the same font and style, and the Date/Time is centered.
New Note to recipient editing: guidance text is gray and your typed note shows in green.
Done editing is now a floating button pinned to the lower screen while you edit.
Removed the compact mic button; double-tap the card to start typing or edit the date and time.
After you finish editing, the Send to whom button gently blinks to guide the next step.
